name: corpus_manifest.csv
text:
document_id | title | filename | category | storyline | related_docs | key_entities | intended_workflows | extraction_difficulty | source_type | lineage | notes | frontend_mock_refs | pages | file_size_bytes
CTR-010 | Master Service Agreement v4.2 | contracts/Master Service Agreement v4.2.pdf | contract | contract_gap_detection | CTR-011; CTR-012; CTR-013; LEG-001; MIN-101 | Meridian Holdings Ltd.; Northwind Cloud Systems LLC; 2024-01-15; $2,400,000 annual value; Section 7.3; Section 8.2 | Document Review; Comparison; Chat / RAG; Workflow Inspector; Contract Risk Extraction | medium | derived_from_existing | Derived from option_b CTR-002 vendor-draft storyline; rewritten to align with frontend mock findings and March 2024 timeline. | Primary source for unlimited liability, 12-month claim window, derivative IP, 90-day renewal notice, and structured entity extraction. | documents:d1; workflowRuns:r1,r6; findings:f1,f4; chat:c1,c2,c3,c4; comparisonDiffs:cd1,cd3,cd5; structuredTasks:st1,st6 | 3 | 10281
CTR-011 | MSA Negotiation Baseline — Approved Position | contracts/MSA Negotiation Baseline - Approved Position.pdf | contract | contract_gap_detection | CTR-010; LEG-001; MIN-101 | 2× annual contract value; 30-day notice; customer retains derivative IP; 24-hour critical incident notice; SCC Appendix C | Comparison; Document Review; Chat / RAG | easy | derived_from_existing | Derived from option_b CTR-001 approved baseline and updated to mirror frontend comparison diffs. | Primary comparator for approved contractual positions. | comparisonDiffs:cd1,cd2,cd3,cd5; chat:c4 | 1 | 4591
CTR-012 | Cloud Infrastructure SLA | contracts/Cloud Infrastructure SLA.pdf | contract | contract_gap_detection | CTR-010; EXC-001; RSK-001 | 99.5% uptime; 12 months of fees paid; P1 15 minutes; sole remedy service credits | Document Review; Comparison; Chat / RAG | easy | derived_from_existing | Derived from option_b CTR-003 and rewritten to match frontend SLA finding and liability chat comparison. | Primary source for the uptime-gap finding and SLA-versus-MSA comparison. | documents:d4; findings:f3; chat:c3,c4; comparisonDiffs:cd4 | 2 | 6026
CTR-013 | Data Processing Addendum 2024 | contracts/Data Processing Addendum 2024.pdf | privacy | compliance_review | GOV-001; POL-032; CHG-001 | Controller; Processor; Clause 5.2; Clause 5.4; Appendix C reserved | Document Review; Policy Comparison; Chat / RAG; Compliance Checklist | medium | derived_from_existing | Derived from option_b CTR-004 and rewritten to preserve the missing residency/SCC gap required by the frontend. | Primary source for missing data residency and SCC recommendation. | documents:d2; findings:f2; actionItems:ai2; comparisonDiffs:cd2 | 2 | 6615
LEG-001 | Legal Redline Summary — MSA v4.2 | legal/Legal Redline Summary - MSA v4.2.pdf | legal_memo | contract_gap_detection | CTR-010; CTR-011; MIN-101; EXC-001 | liability cap; 30-day notice; customer retains derivative IP; 72-hour incident notice counterproposal | Comparison; Document Review; Action Plan | medium | synthetic | Created from scratch to satisfy the requested hard-ambiguity / partial-fix document. | Explicitly leaves one critical issue open while showing that some clauses improved. | comparisonDiffs:cd1,cd3,cd5; workflowRuns:r6 | 2 | 5987
POL-031 | Information Security Policy v3.1 | policies/Information Security Policy v3.1.pdf | policy | policy_diff | POL-032; AUD-101; MIN-101 | REQ-IR-07; reasonable efforts; 180-day logs; six-month privileged review | Document Review; Policy Comparison; Chat / RAG | easy | derived_from_existing | Derived from option_b POL-001 / POL-002 storyline and rewritten to create the exact incident-notification weakness expected by the mock frontend. | Primary source for the security finding on vague incident-response timing. | documents:d3; findings:f5; actionItems:ai4 | 2 | 6506
POL-032 | Information Security Policy v3.2 | policies/Information Security Policy v3.2.pdf | policy | policy_diff | POL-031; AUD-101; REM-001 | 24-hour incident notice; quarterly privileged reviews; 12-month logs | Policy Comparison; Document Review | easy | derived_from_existing | Derived from option_b POL-002 and aligned to the improvement path implied by the frontend finding. | Comparator document for policy-version analysis. | workflowRuns:r2 | 1 | 4458
POL-033 | Data Retention Policy | policies/Data Retention Policy.pdf | policy | evidence_chaining | EVD-101; EVD-102; REM-001 | 3-year access-review evidence retention; 7-year contract retention | Chat / RAG; Action Plan; Evidence Review | easy | derived_from_existing | Derived from option_b POL-003 and updated to reference Meridian repositories and evidence provenance. | Supports retention questions and evidence lifecycle realism. | chat:retention-example | 1 | 4033
POL-034 | Third-Party Supplier Code of Conduct | policies/Third-Party Supplier Code of Conduct.pdf | policy | contract_gap_detection | CTR-010; CTR-013; AUD-101 | 24-hour incident notice; subprocessor notice; evidence support | Document Review; Policy Comparison; Chat / RAG | easy | derived_from_existing | Derived from option_b POL-004 and aligned to Meridian procurement governance. | Useful external-facing policy comparator against weaker contract clauses. | chat:policy-example | 1 | 3533
GOV-001 | GDPR Compliance Checklist | governance/GDPR Compliance Checklist.pdf | checklist | compliance_review | CTR-013; LEG-001; POL-031 | GDPR-ART-44; GDPR-ART-46; SCC Appendix C | Policy Comparison; Document Review; Workflow Inspector | easy | synthetic | Created from scratch to ground the privacy/compliance workflow and checklist status in the frontend. | Explicitly surfaces the transfer-mechanism gap and incident-timing partial status. | documents:d5; workflowRuns:r2 | 1 | 4356
RSK-001 | Vendor Risk Assessment Template | risk/Vendor Risk Assessment Template.pdf | risk_register | remediation_workflow | CTR-010; CTR-012; CTR-013; MIN-101 | Maria Santos; James Park; Alex Rivera; Blocked SOC2 review | Action Plan; Evidence Review; Document Library | medium | synthetic | Created from scratch as the required spreadsheet-export PDF and action-tracking bridge document. | Main grounding document for the action-plan workflow and blocked SOC2 item. | documents:d6; workflowRuns:r4; actionItems:ai6 | 2 | 5739
AUD-101 | Internal Audit Checklist — Vendor Controls | audit/Internal Audit Checklist - Vendor Controls.pdf | audit | evidence_chaining | AUD-102; EVD-101; MIN-101; POL-031 | Q1 2024 audit; missing admin approval evidence; Appendix C gap; 99.5% SLA partial | Action Plan; Evidence Review; Chat / RAG | easy | derived_from_existing | Derived from option_b AUD-001 with a Q1 2024 timeline and alignment to the frontend action plan. | Provides the audit-to-remediation bridge for the evidence storyline. | workflowRuns:r4 | 1 | 4164
AUD-102 | Nonconformance Report — Vendor Access Review | audit/Nonconformance Report - Vendor Access Review.pdf | ncr | evidence_chaining | AUD-101; EVD-101; EVD-102; REM-001 | NCR-2024-011; Priya Nair; Maria Santos; James Park; Alex Rivera | Action Plan; Evidence Review | easy | derived_from_existing | Derived from option_b AUD-002 with direct alignment to action owners and dates used in the frontend. | Contains operationalized findings and due dates for remediation tracking. | actionItems:ai1,ai2,ai4,ai5 | 2 | 5595
EVD-101 | Access Review Evidence Log | audit/Access Review Evidence Log.pdf | evidence_log | evidence_chaining | AUD-102; EVD-102; REM-001 | EV-002 missing; GRC/VendorControls/2024-Q1 | Evidence Review; Action Plan | medium | derived_from_existing | Derived from option_b EVD-001 and updated to point to a real attached evidence artifact in the derived corpus. | Primary evidence register used for provenance and closure readiness testing. | evidence:ev-002 | 1 | 4223
MIN-101 | Governance Committee Minutes and Action Items | audit/Governance Committee Minutes and Action Items.pdf | minutes | remediation_workflow | CTR-010; AUD-102; EXC-001; REM-001 | Maria Santos; James Park; Alex Rivera; 2024-03-15 committee | Action Plan; Evidence Review; Executive Decks | easy | derived_from_existing | Derived from option_b MIN-001 and rewritten so the action table matches the frontend mock action items. | Primary source of owner / due-date / status mapping for the action-plan workflow. | actionItems:ai1,ai2,ai3,ai4,ai5 | 2 | 6253
EVD-102 | Privileged Account Approval Email | evidence/Privileged Account Approval Email.pdf | email_artifact | evidence_chaining | EVD-101; AUD-102; REM-001 | Priya Nair; Alex Rivera; 2024-01-22 approval; EV-002 | Evidence Review; Action Plan; OCR / format routing | medium | synthetic | Created from scratch to satisfy the requested attached evidence artifact and email-PDF format. | Resolves the missing approval evidence in the evidence log. | attached_evidence:yes | 1 | 4077
EXC-001 | Temporary Risk Acceptance Request — SLA Uptime | risk/Temporary Risk Acceptance Request - SLA Uptime.pdf | risk_acceptance | remediation_workflow | CTR-012; MIN-101; BRD-001 | 99.5% monthly uptime; expires 2024-06-30; compensating controls | Action Plan; Evidence Review; Executive Decks | easy | synthetic | Created from scratch to satisfy the formal risk-acceptance / waiver requirement. | Maintains realism by separating commercial acceptance of uptime risk from unresolved legal/privacy issues. | lacuna:risk_acceptance | 1 | 4370
CHG-001 | Subprocessor Change Notice | privacy/Subprocessor Change Notice.pdf | change_notice | compliance_review | CTR-013; GOV-001; POL-034 | EuroLogix Support GmbH; effective 2024-05-05; 15-day objection window | Document Review; Chat / RAG; Evidence Review | easy | synthetic | Created from scratch to satisfy the change-notice requirement and subprocessor-change workflow. | Useful for future change communications and privacy-grounding demos. | lacuna:change_notice | 1 | 3820
REM-001 | Remediation Closure Note — Vendor Access Review | audit/Remediation Closure Note - Vendor Access Review.pdf | closure_note | remediation_workflow | AUD-102; EVD-101; EVD-102 | NCR-2024-011; 2024-04-10 closure; residual legal/privacy issues remain | Action Plan; Evidence Review; Executive Decks | easy | synthetic | Created from scratch to complete the audit-to-remediation storyline. | Provides closure readiness without artificially resolving unrelated open risks. | lacuna:closure_readiness | 1 | 3801
OPS-001 | Employee Handbook 2024 | operations/Employee Handbook 2024.pdf | handbook | library_realism | POL-031; POL-033 | approved AI tools; security event reporting; records retention pointer | Document Library; Chat / RAG | medium | synthetic | Created from scratch to satisfy document-library realism and broaden policy coverage. | Provides a natural “handbook / operational policy” document type for the library. | documents:d7 | 2 | 5520
BRD-001 | Q1 2024 Board Memo | governance/Q1 2024 Board Memo.pdf | board_memo | executive_reporting | CTR-010; EXC-001; REM-001 | Board Risk and Audit Committee; conditional launch approval; pilot waiver | Executive Decks; Document Library; Chat / RAG | medium | synthetic | Created from scratch to satisfy the board-memo document-library requirement and executive-deck future use case. | Tracks the same contract/privacy/uptime issues at board level. | documents:d10 | 1 | 4262
HR-001 | Sarah Chen — Senior ML Engineer CV | hiring/Sarah Chen - Senior ML Engineer CV.pdf | cv | candidate_review | HR-002; HR-003; HR-004 | Sarah Chen; 8 years; San Francisco, CA; M.S. Computer Science; 5-person ML pod | Candidate Review; CV Analysis | easy | synthetic | Created from scratch as the main candidate-profile PDF, with fictional employers and institutions to avoid real-person misrepresentation. | Grounds strengths, seniority signals, and experience trajectory without relying on real-company employment claims. | documents:d9; workflowRuns:r3; candidateData:name,title,location,experience,education,strengths,gaps,experiences,senioritySignals | 1 | 3772
HR-002 | Senior ML Engineer Role Brief | hiring/Senior ML Engineer Role Brief.pdf | hiring_brief | candidate_review | HR-001; HR-003; HR-004 | LLM expertise; RAG / retrieval design; regulatory compliance; edge deployment | Candidate Review; Chat / RAG | easy | synthetic | Created from scratch to ground the candidate-review role-fit rubric in the frontend. | Defines the must-have and nice-to-have rubric used in the scorecard. | candidateData:role_fit | 1 | 4283
HR-003 | Hiring Scorecard — Sarah Chen | hiring/Hiring Scorecard - Sarah Chen.pdf | hiring_scorecard | candidate_review | HR-001; HR-002; HR-004 | 87 / 100; Strong Hire; RAG gap; compliance gap | Candidate Review; Executive Decks | easy | synthetic | Created from scratch to ground overall score and recommendation in a reviewable document. | Maps directly to the frontend score, strengths, and gap framing. | candidateData:overallScore,recommendation | 1 | 4653
HR-004 | Interview Feedback Memo — Sarah Chen | hiring/Interview Feedback Memo - Sarah Chen.pdf | hiring_memo | candidate_review | HR-001; HR-002; HR-003 | Strong Hire; RAG / retrieval probe; regulated workload gap | Candidate Review; Executive Decks | easy | synthetic | Created from scratch to provide a narrative hiring memo and optional supporting artifact. | Turns scorecard output into a defensible written recommendation. | candidateData:strengths,gaps,recommendation | 1 | 3773
TEC-001 | Technical Architecture Brief | technical/Technical Architecture Brief.pdf | technical_brief | library_realism | CTR-012; POL-031; BRD-001 | Knowledge Operations Platform; scan-heavy appendices; vendor retrieval cluster | Document Library; OCR / routing; Workflow Inspector | high | synthetic | Created from scratch as the required technical and OCR-hard document. Pages 12-15 are image-only appendices. | Designed to justify the frontend warning about OCR fallback failure on pages 12-15. | documents:d8; workflowRuns:r5 | 15 | 542313

metadata.title: corpus manifest
